name: South on Main

seo.title: South on Main — Restaurant & Bar in SoMa Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: South on Main is SoMa's anchor dining destination — thoughtful Southern cuisine, a serious cocktail program, and a room that feels like exactly what Little Rock's creative district deserves.

description: South on Main occupies the ground floor of the South Main Creative Corridor's most recognizable building — a former dry goods store with high ceilings, exposed brick, and a bar that stretches the length of the room. The kitchen takes Arkansas ingredients seriously: Gulf Coast influences, Hill Country smokehouse traditions, and Low Country vegetable preparation all show up on a menu that changes with the season. The cocktail program is one of the metro's best, leaning into Southern spirits and local infusions. Weekend brunch draws a crowd. If you're taking someone to dinner who isn't sure what Little Rock has, this is the answer.
must_try_items: Fried chicken with hot honey and house pickles

related.title: Best Dinner Spots in Little Rock
